about.question: Who trained your surgeon?
about.title: ICL Expert Instructor
about.desc1: There is a clear reason why results differ even for the same surgery.
about.desc2_1: Dr. Lee Dong Hoon, CEO of Dr.ICL, goes beyond being a mere
about.desc3_1: With rigorous standards and overwhelming proficiency dedicated to physician education,
about.desc3_2: The very skills that set the standard for surgery
about.desc3_3: are applied directly to your precious eyes.

intro.last_p: Beyond a Reference Doctor, Becoming the Standard
intro.last_txt1: Dr. Lee Dong Hoon of Dr.ICL, having served as an ICL Reference Doctor, currently
intro.last_txt1_b: serves as an 'ICL Expert Instructor' — a top 1% global position dedicated to physician education
intro.last_txt2: Higher and more refined standards for teaching surgery to specialists.
intro.last_txt3: At Dr.ICL, the highest level of skill used to teach doctors becomes the standard for every surgery.
intro.last_txt3_b: The difference in results begins with the caliber of the surgeon

expertise.h3_1: Same surgery, different results — the reason lies in
expertise.desc:
Surgical perfection is determined not by equipment, but by the surgeon's experience and judgment.
Know-how accumulated through countless cases creates the difference in outcomes.

items.ko: The Highest Level of Proficiency Beyond a Reference Doctor
items.desc: Not just a doctor who uses equipment, but a physician who shares and teaches the standards for equipment and surgical methods, deeply understanding and applying the principles and structure of surgery. Going beyond experience to creating and advancing standards — that is the role of a surgeon beyond a Reference Doctor.

items.ko: A Dedicated Physician Who Educates and Passes On Surgical Expertise
items.desc: Surgeons come to learn know-how, study actual surgical processes together, and discuss ways to create safer, more refined methods. Teaching someone means maintaining even higher standards, and that process itself is another reason for elevating surgical perfection.

items.ko: Performing Surgery with the Same Perfect Standards Taught to Doctors
items.desc: The same standards and principles used in education are applied to patient surgeries. Not just delivering explanations and theories — because the doctor who created those standards performs the surgery directly, making a difference in both the process and outcomes.

expertise.dark_sub: A doctor who teaches doctors — Dr. Lee Dong Hoon proves it under the name Dr.ICL.

experience.desc: At the end of this journey stands ICL Expert Instructor Dr. Lee Dong Hoon.
tabs: Dr. Lee Dong Hoon, Dedicated to ICL

fallback.title: Selected as One of 6 ICL Expert Doctors Worldwide

news.title: Cornea-preserving vision correction alternative: Criteria for choosing lens implantation
news.author: Dr. Lee Dong Hoon, CEO of Dr.ICL Eye Clinic
news.desc: Amidst the trend of laser vision correction surgeries such as LASIK, LASEK, and SMILE, ICL (Implantable Collamer Lens) is emerging as a new option that prioritizes corneal preservation. Unlike corneal ablation methods, this approach places a special lens behind the iris, preserving the corneal structure.
